creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-12-19 12:14:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    polish/qnapi         Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    polish/qnapi/files   patch-doc-qnapi.desktop patch-qnapi.pro

  Log:
  - Add LICENSE info
  - Mark MAKE_JOBS_SAFE
  - Install KDE4 integration file
  - Add patch so that location of 7z binary is not badly hardcoded
  - Don't install some non essential files
  - Remove md5 sum
  
  PR:             based on ports/152619
  Submitted by:   Pawel Pekala (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
